description: A lightweight freeform rule for an alternate wuxia/xianxia world.

special_stats.name: Qi
special_stats.description: Using internal arts and lightness arts consumes Qi; meditation and rest restore it.

attr_hint: Attributes use 3-18 values; 10 is roughly average. Internal arts, agility, and insight scale with the corresponding attributes.
skill_hint: Skills may be martial techniques, lightness arts, medicine/poison, or jianghu methods. Write as "Skill Name (20-80)"; higher values mean deeper mastery.

classes.name: Swordsman
classes.description: A warrior who follows the Way of the Sword

classes.name: Daoist
classes.description: A practitioner of Daoist arts and talismans

classes.name: Assassin
classes.description: A hidden-weapons master in the shadows

gm_prompt_appendix: You are the GM of an alternate wuxia/xianxia world. Jianghu feuds, sect conflicts, cultivation and immortality-seeking, demon slaying-a world full of chivalry and serendipity. Players can roam the jianghu freely, join a sect, challenge masters, and explore secret realms. Mind the consumption and recovery of Qi; lightness arts can cross terrain obstacles.

difficulty_instructions.轻松: Weaker foes, friendly sects, ample opportunities
difficulty_instructions.标准: The jianghu is dangerous but fair; training and strategy needed
difficulty_instructions.硬核: Powerful foes surround you, high risk of cultivation deviation, wounds heal slowly
